allow: PowerShell(node --version; npm --version; git --version; \(Get-Location\).Path; Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(node --input-type=module -e "import {loadDataset} from './packages/core/src/dataset.mjs'; import {generateBriefing} from './packages/core/src/briefing.mjs'; const b=generateBriefing\(loadDataset\(\)\); console.log\('summary', JSON.stringify\(b.summary\)\); console.log\('active_series', b.active_series.map\(s=>s.crime+' @ '+s.station+' \(p='+s.cluster.p+'\)'\)\); console.log\('emerging', b.emerging.slice\(0,3\).map\(e=>e.crime+' '+e.station+' z='+e.z\)\); console.log\('watch', b.watch_offenders.map\(o=>o.name+':'+o.score\)\);")

PowerShell(node --input-type=module -e "import {loadDataset} from './packages/core/src/dataset.mjs'; import {generateBriefing} from './packages/core/src/briefing.mjs'; const b=generateBriefing\(loadDataset\(\)\); console.log\('summary', JSON.stringify\(b.summary\)\); console.log\('emerging', b.emerging.map\(e=>e.crime+' @ '+e.station+' z='+e.z+' n='+e.count\)\);")
